CVE-2019-3832.title: It was discovered the fix for CVE-2018-19758 (libsndfile) was not ...
CVE-2019-3832.summary: It was discovered the fix for CVE-2018-19758 (libsndfile) was not complete and still allows a read beyond the limits of a buffer in wav_write_header() function in wav.c. A local attacker may use this flaw to make the application crash.

CVE-2021-3246.title: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability in msadpcm_decode_block of l ...
CVE-2021-3246.summary: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability in msadpcm_decode_block of libsndfile 1.0.30 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted WAV file.

CVE-2021-4156.title: An out-of-bounds read flaw was found in libsndfile's FLAC codec f ...
CVE-2021-4156.summary: An out-of-bounds read flaw was found in libsndfile's FLAC codec functionality. An attacker who is able to submit a specially crafted file (via tricking a user to open or otherwise) to an application linked with libsndfile and using the FLAC codec, could trigger an out-of-bounds read that would most likely cause a crash but could potentially leak memory information that could be used in further exploitation of other flaws.

CVE-2022-33064.title: An off-by-one error in function wav_read_header in src/wav.c in L ...
CVE-2022-33064.summary: An off-by-one error in function wav_read_header in src/wav.c in Libsndfile 1.1.0, results in a write out of bound, which allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code, Denial of Service or other unspecified impacts.

CVE-2022-33065.title: Multiple signed integers overflow in function au_read_header in s ...
CVE-2022-33065.summary: Multiple signed integers overflow in function au_read_header in src/au.c and in functions mat4_open and mat4_read_header in src/mat4.c in Libsndfile, allows an attacker to cause Denial of Service or other unspecified impacts.

CVE-2024-50612.title: libsndfile through 1.2.2 has an ogg_vorbis.c vorbis_analysis_wrot ...
CVE-2024-50612.summary: libsndfile through 1.2.2 has an ogg_vorbis.c vorbis_analysis_wrote out-of-bounds read.

CVE-2024-50613.title: libsndfile through 1.2.2 has a reachable assertion, that may lead ...
CVE-2024-50613.summary: libsndfile through 1.2.2 has a reachable assertion, that may lead to application exit, in mpeg_l3_encode.c mpeg_l3_encoder_close.

CVE-2025-52194.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in libsndfile version 1.2. ...
CVE-2025-52194.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in libsndfile version 1.2.2 and potentially earlier versions when processing malformed IRCAM audio files. The vulnerability occurs in the ircam_read_header function at src/ircam.c:164 during sample rate processing, leading to memory corruption and potential code execution.
